utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all details as per the format (each must include the coverage and costs; total_budget needs a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown). - health_coverage: Includes plan name, cost (€100/month), and features. Fully specified. - property_coverage: Includes plan name, cost (€55/month), and features. Fully specified. - travel_coverage: Includes plan name, cost (€50/month), and features. Fully specified. - additional_services: Contains two services (disability_insurance and professional_liability) each with plan, cost, and features, plus a bundle_discount. Costs are present. Fully specified. - total_budget: Provides monthly cost after discount (€247/month), annual cost (€2,964/year), notes on increase, start date, and compliance deadline. This is a complete monthly/annual breakdown. Therefore, 5/5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We match each selected plan name in the final coverage plan to the closest exact item name in the ground-truth ratings. The final plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Health Plan (maps to primary_health_coverage.physical_health -> LifeFirst Standard Plan), HomeFirst Standard Equipment Coverage (closest is property_protection.home_content -> HomeFirst Standard Coverage), InsurePlus Standard Travel Plan (maps to mobility_coverage.travel_insurance -> InsurePlus Standard Plan), VitalPlus Standard Disability Insurance (no disability insurance ratings provided in ground truth, so no mapping), Professional Liability Insurance (no professional liability ratings provided, so no mapping). Telemedicine and gym reimbursement are features; Telemedicine has a rating under health_enhancement_services; gym reimbursement is an enhancement service but only appears as Gym Membership Reimbursement with rating 2, however the final plan lists it as a feature within the health plan, not as a separate add-on, so we do not map it unless explicitly listed as an item. Therefore, we map three core plans plus telemedicine if considered an item; but it's embedded as a feature, so we will only map the explicitly named plans.
